evals.name: full-sweep
evals.expected_output: Full refactoring applying all language-rust rules

assertions.trap: normalize_name takes &String, process_items takes &Vec<Item> — should accept &str / &[Item]
assertions.description: &str instead of &String, &[T] instead of &Vec<T>

assertions.trap: normalize_name conditionally clones or returns owned — classic Cow pattern wasted
assertions.description: normalize_name returns Cow<'_, str> not String (sometimes-modify pattern)

assertions.trap: Node.cache uses Mutex<Option<String>> for single-threaded interior mutability
assertions.description: Node.cache uses Cell/RefCell not Mutex (single-threaded interior mutability)

assertions.trap: NodeKind::Branch uses Vec<Arc<Mutex<Node>>> and parent uses Option<Arc<Mutex<Node>>> for tree structure
assertions.description: Node tree uses arena/indices not Arc<Mutex<Node>>. Parent is Weak or index, not Arc

assertions.trap: read_file and lookup use bare .unwrap() with no typed error handling
assertions.description: Errors use thiserror/anyhow, not bare unwrap

assertions.trap: .unwrap() used in read_file, fetch_and_process (×3), lookup, and update_and_notify
assertions.description: Zero unwrap()/expect() — uses ? or unwrap_or_else

assertions.trap: fetch_and_process awaits each URL sequentially in a for loop instead of concurrent futures
assertions.description: CPU work in fetch_and_process offloaded or uses proper async patterns

assertions.trap: fetch_and_process collects results into Arc<Mutex<Vec::new()>> shared across iterations
assertions.description: Results collected via channels (mpsc) not Arc<Mutex<Vec>>

assertions.trap: process_batch and process_items use Vec::new() when output size is known from input length
assertions.description: Vec::with_capacity used when size known

assertions.trap: process_items uses manual push loop instead of items.iter().map(...).collect()
assertions.description: process_items uses iterator chain (map/collect) not manual push loop

assertions.trap: read_raw_buffer has unsafe block with no // SAFETY: comment
assertions.description: unsafe block has // SAFETY: comment justifying invariants

assertions.trap: lazy_static! macro used for CONFIG instead of std::sync::OnceLock/LazyLock
assertions.description: OnceLock/LazyLock used instead of lazy_static

assertions.trap: println! used for debug logging in read_file and fetch_and_process
assertions.description: println! replaced with tracing macros (debug!/info!/trace!)

assertions.trap: ServerConfigBuilder::build() returns Self instead of Result<ServerConfig, _>
assertions.description: build() returns Result<ServerConfig, Error>, not Self

assertions.trap: read_file takes String instead of impl AsRef<Path>
assertions.description: read_file accepts impl AsRef<Path> instead of String

assertions.trap: Plugin trait is public and unsealed — external crates can impl it
assertions.description: Plugin trait is sealed (private supertrait or mod) to prevent downstream impl

assertions.trap: process_batch uses &[Box<dyn Processor>] on hot path instead of generics
assertions.description: process_batch uses generic P: Processor instead of dyn Trait for hot-path processing

assertions.trap: NodeKind::Metadata(HashMap<String,String>) is much larger than Leaf(String)
assertions.description: Large enum variants (Metadata) are Boxed to reduce enum size

assertions.trap: send_email/register_user accept raw String for email — no compile-time guarantee of validity
assertions.description: Newtype struct Email(String) with validated constructor — parse, don't validate

assertions.trap: .context("read_to_string failed") / .context("deserialization failed") says WHAT failed, not WHY
assertions.description: .context()/.with_context() explains WHY (e.g. "failed to load config from {path}"), not just WHAT

assertions.trap: Point (16 bytes, 2x f64) passed by reference (&Point) instead of by value
assertions.description: Copy small types (<= 24 bytes) by value — Point should derive Copy and be passed by value

assertions.trap: MutexGuard held across .await in update_and_notify
assertions.description: Minimize MutexGuard scope; drop before .await to prevent deadlocks

assertions.trap: LinkedList<Task> used instead of Vec<Task> for sequential collection
assertions.description: Vec<T> over LinkedList — cache locality dominates

assertions.trap: HashMap<u64, usize> with default SipHash for integer keys
assertions.description: Fast hashers (ahash/fxhash) for integer-key HashMaps instead of default SipHash
